title: With-human creates a compact feedback request
query: AGI Toy Shop has 8 TikTok hook variants for a new toy drop. Ask Kenji for the fastest useful feedback so the Goal loop can improve the content skill.
reference_points: Treats human feedback as a provider inside a Goal loop, not a separate loop runtime
Asks one short review question Kenji can answer quickly
Includes artifact references and a concrete feedback.json shape
Defines how the parent Goal should resume from the feedback
Does not claim feedback is available before Kenji responds
notes: Tests the new human feedback provider abstraction.
